center.name: Serra do Mar coastal forests
center.summary: Serra do Mar coastal forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、紅尾鸚鵡、Serra do Mar tyrant-manakin等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the serra do Mar coastal forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in a small area of eastern Bahia and in a larger one encompassing extreme southern Minas Gerais, Rio de Janeiro, and eastern São Paulo states (Serra do Mar coastal forests)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-backed antvireo is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests, primarily between Rio de Janeiro and Paraná states. Since 2013 there have been scattered records from further south in Santa Catarina.Kohler, G.U

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: As its name suggests, it is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests, from southeastern Minas Gerais and southwestern Espírito Santo states south into northeastern Rio Grande do Sul

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the Serra do Mar coastal forests, where it greatly favors the forest edge, dense secondary forest, and areas of stunted woody vegetation

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Serra do Mar coastal forests, Paraguay and northeastern Argentina.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/ |title=IOC World Bird List (v 11.2) |last1=Gill |first1= F
